title: Build reliable multi-agent applications with ADK Go 2.0
abstract: Develop highly reliable and scalable multi-agent systems with robust agent communication and coordination mechanisms for complex application environments.
abstract_zh: 这工具就是专为那些复杂应用环境打造的超级小伙伴系统啊！不仅让每个小团队都能高效沟通、无缝协作，还能应对各种突发状况，绝对是你朋友圈里的顶配“黑科技”伙伴。
